README.purpose: Literature-oriented publication cases. Geometry/control fields follow cited tables in reference_machines; remaining 0-D placeholders (Ti, fG, Paux, …) are documented there and must not be over-claimed as full paper reproduction.

PD|REACTOR|SPARC_CLASS.title: SPARC-class compact HTS
PD|REACTOR|SPARC_CLASS.source: SPARC-class public parameters via SHAMS REFERENCE_MACHINES (compact HTS class); replace with paper table for formal claims.

PD|REACTOR|ARC_CLASS.source: ARC-class public parameters via SHAMS REFERENCE_MACHINES; replace with paper table for formal claims.

PD|REACTOR|STEP_BASELINE.title: STEP Prototype Plant baseline (literature table)
PD|REACTOR|STEP_BASELINE.source: Hudoba et al., Fusion Engineering and Design 191 (2023) 113704, Table 1 (Ip, R0, a, Bt, kappa, delta, q95, betaN). Ti/fG/Paux are SHAMS placeholders.

PD|REACTOR|EUDEMO_A26.title: EU DEMO low-A size point (A=2.6, literature table)
PD|REACTOR|EUDEMO_A26.source: Bachmann et al., Fusion Engineering and Design 204 (2024) 114518, Table 8 size point A=2.6. Non-table fields are placeholders.

PD|REACTOR|EUDEMO_A31.source: Bachmann et al., Fusion Engineering and Design 204 (2024) 114518, Table 8 size point A=3.1. Non-table fields are placeholders.

PD|REACTOR|EUDEMO_A33.title: EU DEMO low-A size point (A=3.3, literature table)
PD|REACTOR|EUDEMO_A33.source: Bachmann et al., Fusion Engineering and Design 204 (2024) 114518, Table 8 size point A=3.3. Non-table fields are placeholders.

PD|REACTOR|HH170.source: Public slide / brochure values via SHAMS REFERENCE_MACHINES REF|REACTOR|HH170 — verify against primary citation before publication.
